meaning: n.起源,由来,起因,出身,血统,[数]原点
examples: The origin of the custom is obscure.
The origin of the word remains obscure.
They talked about the competing theories of the origin of life.
Native Americans are clearly of Asian origin, and entered the Americas less than 40, 000 years ago.
Isle of Man queenies have been awarded the European Union Protected Designation of Origin (PDO) stamp.
